LeaderboardEntry.title: LeaderboardEntry
LeaderboardEntry.description: An entry in the anime guess leaderboard tracking scores and player words per minute (WPM).

name.description: The screen name of the player.

score.description: The score achieved by the player.

wpm.description: The typing speed / guess speed in words per minute.

category.description: The category of the quiz played.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the score was recorded.

anime_guess/{entryId}.description: Leaderboard database storing high scores, WPM metrics, and user categories.
